notes: Enhancement request to enable nullable reference types in SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor. Confirmed the feature is fully implemented: the csproj has <Nullable>enable</Nullable> since PR #2505 (3.0 modernization, 2023-07-30), all source files use proper nullable annotations, no #nullable disable directives exist, and the released NuGet package (3.119.2) contains NullableContextAttribute in the assembly.

actionability.reason: The enhancement was completed in PR #2505 (SkiaSharp 3.0 modernization, merged 2023-07-30). The Blazor project has <Nullable>enable</Nullable> and all source files use proper nullable annotations with no #nullable disable directives. The released NuGet 3.119.2 assembly confirms NullableContextAttribute is present.

actions.description: Close as completed — nullable reference types are fully enabled in SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor

proposedResponse.body:
This enhancement has been completed as part of the SkiaSharp 3.0 modernization in PR #2505.

The `SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor` project now has `<Nullable>enable</Nullable>` in its csproj and all source files use proper nullable annotations throughout (e.g., `byte[]?`, `Action<SKPaintSurfaceEventArgs>?`, `GRContext?`, `SKSurface?`, `IReadOnlyDictionary<string, object>?`). No `#nullable disable` directives exist anywhere in the project, and the released NuGet package (3.119.2) contains `NullableContextAttribute` in the assembly.

Closing as completed.
